message:
fix(server,share): validate TUI preset names against empty/collision and reject symlinked DB paths in share operations

TUI preset hardening:
- Add InvalidName error for empty/whitespace-only preset names
- Add FilenameCollision error for distinct names that collide after
  filesystem sanitization (e.g. "my/preset" vs "my_preset")
- Add conflicting_name_for_path check in preset manager
- 4 new tests covering validation edge cases

Symlink-safe share operations:
- Replace resolve_share_sqlite_path with require_real_share_sqlite_path
  across scope.rs, scrub.rs, static_render.rs, and lib.rs so symlinked
  database paths are rejected before any SQLite operations begin
- Update Cargo.lock with fsqlite-vfs dependency addition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
